stories: Daily Market Pulse — Thu, May 07, 2026 (09:27 UTC)
US equities extend the melt-up: S&P 500/Nasdaq close at fresh records
Oil shock: WTI plunges on reports the US and Iran are nearing a deal
Europe flashing stagflation risk: inflation jumps (highest since 2023) as growth cools; PMI tone deteriorates
ECB’s Villeroy: “data, not the date” — optionality stays high into the next prints
India risk: Sensex/Nifty volatile as derivatives signals and global cues dominate
Insider tape (CCI): Crown Castle director Kevin A. Stephens buys 820 shares open-market
Insider tape (PATK): executive files an open-market purchase (Form 4)
Wildcard: Tesla filing flags a potential Texas “Terafab” chip facility costing up to $119B
